ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the utility company operating the plant */,
  "plant_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the plant */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the plant belongs to */,
  "plant_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of plant */,
  "nameplate_capacity" REAL /* Nameplate capacity of the plant in MW */,
  "summer_capacity" REAL /* Summer capacity of the plant in MW */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the plant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date when the plant was commissioned */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date when the plant was decommissioned (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the plant record */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the plant record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the plant record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_utility_id FOREIGN KEY ("utility_id") REFERENCES utilities ("utility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_plant_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_type_id") REFERENCES plant_types ("plant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utilities" (
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utility company */,
  "utility_name" TEXT /* Name of the utility company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the utility company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the utility company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the utility company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the utility company's website */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the utility record */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the utility record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the utility record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utilities_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utilities_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_years" (
  "operating_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating year */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "operating_year" INTEGER /* Year the plant was operating */,
  "operating_month" INTEGER /* Month the plant was operating */,
  "generation" REAL /* Amount of electricity generated in MW */,
  "maintenance_hours" INTEGER /* Total hours the plant was in maintenance */,
  "downtime_hours" INTEGER /* Total hours the plant was down (not generating electricity) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the operating year record */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the operating year record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the operating year record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operating_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operating_years_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operating_years_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operating_years_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_types" (
  "plant_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant type */,
  "plant_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., technical specification, environmental impact assessment) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the document record */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the document record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_documents_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_documents_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
